creditCards.name: American Express Platinum Card
creditCards.signupBonus: 80,000 Membership Rewards points after spending $8,000 in first 6 months
creditCards.aprRange: N/A (charge card - pay in full monthly)

rewardsRate.flights: 5x points on flights booked directly with airlines or on amextravel.com
rewardsRate.hotels: 5x points on hotels booked on amextravel.com

benefits: Access to Amex Centurion Lounges and Priority Pass
$100 Global Entry or TSA PreCheck credit
Complimentary Gold status with Marriott and Hilton

creditCards.name: American Express Gold Card
creditCards.signupBonus: 60,000 Membership Rewards points after spending $6,000 in first 6 months
creditCards.aprRange: N/A (charge card - pay in full monthly)

rewardsRate.dining: 4x points at restaurants worldwide and at US supermarkets (up to $25k/year)
rewardsRate.flights: 3x points on flights booked directly with airlines or on amextravel.com

benefits: $120 annual dining credit ($10/month at Grubhub, The Cheesecake Factory, etc.)
Car rental loss and damage insurance

creditCards.name: Blue Cash Preferred Card from American Express
creditCards.signupBonus: $250 statement credit after spending $3,000 in first 6 months

rewardsRate.groceries: 6% cash back at U.S. supermarkets (up to $6,000/year, then 1%)
rewardsRate.streaming: 6% cash back on select U.S. streaming subscriptions
rewardsRate.gas: 3% cash back at U.S. gas stations
rewardsRate.transit: 3% cash back on transit (taxis, rideshare, parking, tolls, trains, buses)
rewardsRate.other: 1% cash back on all other purchases

benefits: $0 intro annual fee for first year, then $95
0% intro APR on purchases and balance transfers for 12 months
Car rental loss and damage insurance

creditCards.name: Blue Cash Everyday Card from American Express

rewardsRate.groceries: 3% cash back at U.S. supermarkets (up to $6,000/year, then 1%)

rewardsRate.onlineRetail: 3% cash back on U.S. online retail purchases (up to $6,000/year, then 1%)
rewardsRate.other: 1% cash back on all other purchases

benefits: 0% intro APR on purchases and balance transfers for 15 months
Car rental loss and damage insurance

creditCards.name: American Express Green Card

rewardsRate.transit: 3x points on transit (trains, taxis, rideshare, tolls, buses, subways)

Car rental loss and damage insurance

creditCards.name: Hilton Honors American Express Surpass
